title: phlox mollis
intro: Phlox mollis, also known as the downy phlox or fragrant phlox, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its roots and leaves. Consuming Phlox mollis is said to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Phlox mollis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the plant's roots or leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
